inputs.high_level_description: A breathtaking view of Earth from space with the Sun illuminating one side of the planet. The Moon appears in the distance. A deep star field, subtle nebula clouds, and faint orbital grids fill the background. Clean scientific aesthetics are combined with premium print textures, subtle grain,
